reviews.comment:
Muy amable el personal. Baños limpios. Único inconveniente: poco espacio en la playa, hay que hacer cola en la calle incomodando el tránsito

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very friendly. The restrooms were clean. The only drawback was the limited space on the beach; you have to queue in the street, which disrupts traffic.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por valorar nuestro servicio Lidia!!! Te esperamos pronto, saludos cordiales - Equipo ACA CORRIENTES
